sub_modules.fp_mul_unpack: Combinational operand decoder that extracts sign, exponent, fraction, IEEE-754 class information, hidden-bit significand, and unbiased exponent.
sub_modules.fp_mul_special_cases: Combinational special-case handler for NaNs, infinities, zero operands, invalid infinity-times-zero, and testbench-compatible exception flags.
sub_modules.fp_mul_core: Combinational finite multiplication core that XORs signs, adds unbiased exponents, and multiplies significands.
sub_modules.fp_mul_normalize_round: Combinational normalization, rounding, biased exponent reconstruction, overflow detection, and flush-to-zero underflow handling.
